commands: vite link -h # should show help message
vite link ../test-lib-pnpm && cat package.json pnpm-lock.yaml # should link local directory
vite ln ../test-lib-pnpm && cat package.json pnpm-lock.yaml # should work with ln alias
vite unlink ../test-lib-pnpm && vite unlink testnpm2 && cat package.json pnpm-lock.yaml # should unlink the package
